steps.title: Solve the system algebraically
steps.content: We need $y=0$ and $y=7(x^2-49)$. Setting $0=7(x^2-49)$ gives $x^2=49$, so $x=\pm 7$. The pair $(7,0)$ satisfies both.

steps.title: Identify the matching pair
steps.content: Both $(7,0)$ and $(-7,0)$ satisfy the equations, but only $(7,0)$ appears in the answer choices. That confirms C is correct.
